The Philippines' first affordable sushi carousel cart. Pick what you want, pay only for what you pick.

Claim a franchise slotSee the menu

See it. Pick it. Pay per piece.

That belt above is the whole business. Fresh sushi glides past, guests grab what they like, and the plate colour rings up the price.

01

See the carousel

Sealed, fresh sushi glides past on the belt. Instant attention, zero hard sell.

02

Pick any plate

Any roll, any combo, no pressure. Guests build their own plate.

03

Pay per piece

Each colour is a price, ₱25 to ₱40. Pay only for what you took.

A small cart
that pulls a crowd.

The carousel cart fits mall corners and food courts. Cold prep only, no open flame and no exhaust, so it goes almost anywhere a landlord will have you.

Cold prep onlyNo wet kitchenMall-friendly footprintMade fresh daily

The whole menu, on one belt.

From single pieces off the carousel to party trays for the whole barkada. Tap to zoom.

Popular rolls: California Maki, Volcano Roll, Spicy Crab, Ebi Sushi, Alaskan Nigiri, Meaty Uramaki
Party trays: Pure California from ₱175, Mix Sushi from ₱150, Maki Fiesta from ₱200

Ask about the Gryn Wasabi cart

Budget separately for permits (approx. ₱40,000) plus rent and deposit, which vary by site.

Everything included

  • Signature Sushi Carousel Cart, fully built
  • Complete equipment and smallwares
  • ₱20,000 worth of initial stocks
  • Full crew and operations training
  • Mobilization and setup within Metro Manila
  • Ongoing R&D and menu support
  • Cold prep only, no wet kitchen or exhaust needed
